cmp116.title: Renormalization Group Approach to Lattice Gauge Field Theories II. Cluster Expansions
cmp116.author: T. Balaban

cmp119.title: Convergent Renormalization Expansions for Lattice Gauge Theories
cmp119.author: T. Balaban

citations.summary: Linear covariance-root change of variables moves the localized fluctuation integral to the product standard Gaussian interface.
use_for: Source anchor for Gaussian pushforward after the covariance-root change of variables.
do_not_use_for: Do not treat this as the dictionary coordinate identification, determinant normalization, or root-localization theorem.
open_questions: Exact coordinate/dictionary statement for the repository's physical fluctuation field.
Normalization/Jacobian assumptions needed by the Lean Gaussian pushforward field.

citations.summary: Balaban localizes the product-Gaussian expression into quantities H(Z,Z0) and H(Z), with component factorization.
use_for: Source anchor for existence of localized activity H(Z) before Lemma 3 estimates.
do_not_use_for: Do not claim exact finite covariance-root reconstruction from this citation.
Do not claim the repository's active support inclusion without the enlargement convention.
open_questions: Exact map from Balaban localization domains to OmegaPolymerType supports.
Exact active-support and external-field locality theorem needed by Appendix-F support hypotheses.

citations.summary: Main resummation window for the activity H(Z), ending in Lemma 3 and the final exponential activity estimate.
use_for: Navigation to the exact source region for the remaining Lemma 3 boundary discharges.
do_not_use_for: Do not cite the OCR text as exact formula data.
Do not use this broad window as a single monolithic Lean hypothesis.
open_questions: Exact Eq. (2.29) display.
Exact Eq. (2.31) finite P-summation display.
Exact Eq. (2.37) post-P bound.
Exact C3 definition and constant restrictions.

citations.summary: D-stage summability after the product estimate following (2.28); source says it holds for large K and small alpha6.
use_for: Locate the source statement for the D-stage boundary.
do_not_use_for: Do not infer the quantifiers or alpha6 dependence from OCR.
open_questions: Full display and quantifiers over Y0, D, and Y in D.
Precise roles of alpha6, delta, kappa, K, and d_k.

citations.summary: P-summation with fixed Z0 and Y0, controlled by the exponential factor involving the finite bond set P.
use_for: Source target for replacing the carried Eq. (2.31) P-family boundary.
do_not_use_for: Do not assert pBonds_injective, pBonds_subset, or bondCarrier_card_le until the exact displayed sum and set map are extracted.
open_questions: Exact objects corresponding to P, pBonds, bondCarrier, and gapMass.
Whether eq231LocalizationScale is M, L, L/M, or another source scale.
Exact rate parameter and smallness condition.

citations.summary: Post-P resummation over D, P, and Z0 families leading to the fixed Z0' bound before the final Z0' summation.
use_for: Source target for the combined post-P source boundary.
do_not_use_for: Do not split this into standalone Z0 and Z0' residual theorems unless the source text explicitly supports that split.
open_questions: Whether the Lean post-P source boundary is sourced from (2.37) plus the following paragraph or only from Lemma 3/(2.38).
Exact majorization into the canonical Lemma-3 base factor.

citations.summary: Definition region for alpha5 restrictions and the final C3 constant used in Lemma 3.
use_for: Source target for the constant hierarchy request.
do_not_use_for: Do not collapse repeated O(1) constants into one Lean constant without a source majorant theorem.
open_questions: Exact definitions of epsilon1, epsilon2, gamma2, alpha0, alpha1, alpha4, alpha5, alpha6, and C3.
Whether distinct O(1) constants need distinct Lean fields or a common majorant.

citations.summary: Final Lemma 3 activity estimate for H(Z), after all restrictions and resummations.
use_for: Final target shape of the Lemma 3 activity estimate.
do_not_use_for: Do not use (2.38) to pretend the upstream Eq. (2.31) or post-P source boundaries have been proved separately.
open_questions: Exact exponent convention: OCR and existing notes differ on visible half-power/one-half formatting.
Full restriction list preceding Lemma 3.

citations.summary: Post-Lemma-3 insertion of the H(Z) bound into the effective-action estimate.
use_for: Downstream effective-action source anchor after Lemma 3 is available.
do_not_use_for: Do not use this as a proof of the Lemma 3 resummation itself.
open_questions: Exact Lean theorem target for the post-Lemma-3 effective-action consumer.

citations.summary: Localized R-term decay in the convergent expansion paper.
do_not_use_for: Do not substitute this CMP119 R-term bound for CMP116 Lemma 3's H(Z) estimate.
open_questions: Exact bridge from CMP119 localized R terms to the current raw Yang-Mills activity predicate.
